# nayatel_images (Data Source)

List available OS images. Use this to discover the image catalog; to look up a single image by name, use the `nayatel_image` data source instead.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nayatel_images" "available" {}

output "image_names" {
  value = data.nayatel_images.available.images[*].name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `images` (Attributes List) List of available images (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--images))

<a id="nestedatt--images"></a>
### Nested Schema for `images`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
